description:
## Goal

Author `config/embedding.toml` — the configuration consumed by `embed_corpus.py` and `backfill_concepts.py`.

## File Location

`config/embedding.toml`

## Required Sections

```toml
[model]
provider = "ollama"            # ollama | sentence_transformers | api
model_name = "nomic-embed-text"
dimensions = 768

[vector_store]
backend = "chromadb"           # chromadb | qdrant
persist_directory = "./data/vectordb"
collection_name = "guru_chunks"

[processing]
batch_size = 64
show_progress = true
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- Loads cleanly via `tomli`
- All fields above present with sensible defaults
- Comments document each option's accepted values

resolution.note: config/embedding.toml: ollama provider, nomic-embed-text 768-dim, chromadb backend at data/vectordb. sentence_transformers + qdrant documented as alternatives.
